infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RoadSoS needs your location to send it to emergency contacts and find nearby services.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RoadSoS needs your location to send it to emergency contacts.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: RoadSoS uses motion sensors to detect crashes automatically.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RoadSoS uses your camera for live video streaming during emergencies.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: RoadSoS uses your microphone for audio during live video streaming.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RoadSoS needs access to your photo library to share incident photos.
